message:
Add one-liner functions, keyword arguments, and raise statement

- One-liner function definitions: def foo(): pass
- Keyword arguments in calls: func(x=1, y=2)
- Raise statement: raise, raise Exception(msg)
- Parser handles all three without 'Expected Newline' or 'Unexpected token' errors

files.patch:
@@ -30,6 +30,7 @@ pub const TokenType = enum {
     Try,
     Except,
     Finally,
+    Raise,
     Lambda,
     Global,
     With,
@@ -295,6 +296,7 @@ pub const Lexer = struct {
             .{ "try", .Try },
             .{ "except", .Except },
             .{ "finally", .Finally },
+            .{ "raise", .Raise },
             .{ "lambda", .Lambda },
             .{ "global", .Global },
             .{ "with", .With },

@@ -136,6 +136,7 @@ pub const Parser = struct {
                 .From => return try statements.parseImportFrom(self),
                 .Assert => return try statements.parseAssert(self),
                 .Try => return try statements.parseTry(self),
+                .Raise => return try statements.parseRaise(self),
                 .Pass => return try statements.parsePass(self),
                 .Break => return try statements.parseBreak(self),
                 .Continue => return try statements.parseContinue(self),
